utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay I have got one for you , if you had too which one would you rather eat , a seeing eye dog or a talking gorilla ?

utterances.speaker: Cliff
utterances.text: I would have to say ... the talking gorilla , because at least I can explain to him that you are making me eat him .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Somebody went to college . Wow . What is it ? I am sorry .
